task_completion.description: Locate the ABLATION_TOOL node in the Webots scene tree
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots application is open and the scene tree panel displays the 'ABLATION_TOOL' node, preferably expanded to show its 'children' list.

task_completion.description: Add a Pen node to the children of ABLATION_TOOL
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Pen' node is visible inside the 'children' list of the 'ABLATION_TOOL' node in the Webots scene tree.

task_completion.description: Configure the Pen node with the correct name, inkColor, leadSize, and maxDistance
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots field editor or a text editor shows the Pen node configured with name 'ablation_trace', inkColor '0.8 0.1 0.1', leadSize '0.002', and maxDistance '0.01'.

task_completion.description: Add a TouchSensor node to the children of ABLATION_TOOL
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'TouchSensor' node is visible inside the 'children' list of the 'ABLATION_TOOL' node in the Webots scene tree.

task_completion.description: Configure the TouchSensor node with the correct name, type, and translation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Webots field editor or a text editor shows the TouchSensor node configured with name 'tip_force_sensor', type 'force-3d', and translation '0 0 -0.05'.

task_completion.description: Save the validated world to the specified Desktop path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save World As' dialog in Webots, a file manager window, or a terminal command confirming the file is saved exactly as '/home/ga/Desktop/validated_surgical_sim.wbt'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Webots GUI or a legitimate text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Webots interface or a text editor (like VS Code, nano, vim) being used to modify the world, rather than just terminal echo commands.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal shortcuts to bypass actual configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show the agent simply echoing the expected node strings directly into the .wbt file without verifying the structure.

integrity.description: The output file was genuinely created or saved
integrity.visual_evidence: The file '/home/ga/Desktop/validated_surgical_sim.wbt' should appear in the file explorer or terminal ls output at the end of the trajectory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target tool node: 'ABLATION_TOOL'. Expected Pen node configuration: name='ablation_trace', inkColor='0.8 0.1 0.1', leadSize='0.002', maxDistance='0.01'. Expected TouchSensor node configuration: name='tip_force_sensor', type='force-3d', translation='0 0 -0.05' (translation_z is -0.05). Output file must be saved to '/home/ga/Desktop/validated_surgical_sim.wbt'.
